bird.name: 狮鹛
bird.summary: 狮鹛 （学名：Leonardina woodi）属于从画眉科裂分出来的雀眉科下狮鹛属下的物种。狮鹛属里仅存在这一种鸟。过去也曾把此鸟类归属于鹟科（Muscicapidae）。其分布于菲律宾，是菲律宾特有的原始珍稀鸟类。 参考文献

locations.name: 阿波火山
locations.summary: 阿波火山（他加祿語：Bundok Apo）是一座位于菲律宾棉兰老岛东南部的活火山，海拔2,954公尺，为菲律宾最高峰。达沃市位于其东北方30公里处。近百年未喷发，有硫磺矿，覆盖着热带硬木林。 主峰及周围已经开辟为阿波火山国家公园（面积80…

locations.name: Mount Kitanglad
locations.summary: Mount Kitanglad is an inactive volcano located in the Kitanglad Mountain Range in Bukidnon province on Mindanao island.

relations.subject: 狮鹛
relations.evidence: This species occurs in other protected areas such as Mount Apo and Mount Kitanglad

relations.subject: 狮鹛
relations.evidence: Its habitat is in moist montane forests up to 2,030 meters above sea level. It is named after the Bagobo tribe
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 狮鹛
relations.evidence: It is not as threatened as other Philippine endemics as its montane habitat is less prone to deforestation as compared to lowland forests due to accessibility issues
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
